property.name: 1.low
property.value: SettlementList.Any(IsAbandoned == false && FactionContext.IsEnemy) == false && ( BanditryLevel < MediumBanditryLevelThreshold || SettlementList.All(FactionContext == PlayersFaction))

callback_with_context.context_function_id: #show confirmation popup only for iron-favour reward on destination node# ( has_iron_favour_reward = SelectedCharacter.CaravanContext.DestinationNodeContext.ActiveContractList.FirstContext.ResourceBoughtContext.Key == "wh3_cp1_cth_iron_favour" ) => { DoIfElse( has_iron_favour_reward, ShowPrompt( "", Loc("wh3_cp1_ivory_road_confirmation_popup"), Do(PlayersFaction.FactionCaravansContext.StartCaravan(SelectedCharacter.CaravanContext, SelectedCharacter.CaravanContext.DestinationNodeContext.ActiveContractList.FirstContext, Component("cargo_amount_value").GetValue), ClosePanel("cp1_cth_bhashiva_caravans", true), UiMsg("AcceptCommandPrompt")) ), Do(PlayersFaction.FactionCaravansContext.StartCaravan(SelectedCharacter.CaravanContext, SelectedCharacter.CaravanContext.DestinationNodeContext.ActiveContractList.FirstContext, Component("cargo_amount_value").GetValue), ClosePanel("cp1_cth_bhashiva_caravans", true)) ) }

client_state_player.name: client_state_player
client_state_player.tooltip: You are a tributary state of this faction

vassal_player.name: vassal_player
vassal_player.tooltip: You are a puppet of this faction

favour_reward.componentleveltooltip: Iron Favour provided for reaching this location

icon_can_loan.componentleveltooltip: This army can be loaned from {{CcoCampaignMilitaryForce:FactionContext.Name}}

mouseover_blocker.comment: blocks mouse detection for bottom 2 px rows to prevent mouseon/off anim glitch
blocks mouse detection for bottom 2 px rows to prevent mouseon/off anim glitch
blocks mouse detection for bottom 2 px rows to prevent mouseon/off anim glitch

property.name: comment
property.value: comment: Nick.L: This is used to propagate CcoCampaignCaravan for the selected idle/reserve caravan

property.name: comment
property.value: Nick.L: This is used to propagate CcoCampaignCaravan for the selected active caravan

property.name: comment
property.value: comment: Nick.L: This is used to propagate CcoCampaignCaravan for the selected idle/reserve caravan

property.name: comment
property.value: Nick.L: This is used to propagate CcoCampaignCaravan for the selected active caravan

relics_reward.componentleveltooltip: Relics provided for reaching this location

callback_with_context.context_function_id: DoIfElse(node.IsEndNode == false && caravan.PathNodeList.Any(NodeSegmentLinkList.Any(EndNodeContext == node)), ChangePathSegment(caravan.PathNodeList.FirstContext(NodeSegmentLinkList.Any(EndNodeContext == node)).SegmentTowardsNodeContext(node), caravan.PathNodeList.FirstContext(IsEndNode).ActiveContractList.FirstContext), caravan.SetAutoPathTowardsNode(node, node.ActiveContractList.FirstContext))
DoIfElse( IsSelected, Do(CampaignRoot.ClearSelection, self.SetState("active")) , Do(Select, ZoomToPoint(CaravanContext.Position), UiMsg("refresh_selected_bhashiva_caravan")) )

property.name: comment
property.value: Nick.L: not showing info panel for bhashiva caravan characters

property.name: comment
property.value: Nick.L: not showing info panel for bhashiva caravan characters

treasury_reward.componentleveltooltip: Treasury provided for reaching this location
